ratings.notes: proposed_contextual_controlled<TAB>4<TAB>3<TAB>5<TAB>4<TAB>The response is contextually relevant, maintains persona consistency with the Scholar's formal and cautious nature but could improve naturalness by being less rigid.
baseline_no_context<TAB>2<TAB>3<TAB>5<TAB>4<TAB>The response is consistent in tone, though it lacks contextual grounding to the immediate situation at Dune Outpost and player's urgency.
